title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Quick Start Guide onboarding screens do not match Figma design when swiping through earbuds and charge case views
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data) to reach the Quick Start Guide (QSG) onboarding flow.
On the first QSG screen, swipe right from the right edge of the screen.
Observe the second QSG screen showing two earbuds.
Swipe right again from the right edge of the screen.
Observe the third QSG screen showing the charge case (outside view).
Swipe right again from the right edge of the screen.
Observe the fourth QSG screen showing the charge case (inside view).
expected: All QSG screens (two earbuds, charge case outside, charge case inside) match the Figma design in layout, imagery, and text.
